NTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY 47
Wife is ofExcessive short tempered:
If Venus has a combination ofRavi, Mars (Venus+ Ravi
+ Mars) or if this combination is in 2nd to Venus then the wife will
have excessive short temper.
Wife will have a Government Job
In a horoscope, if Saturn has a combination of Guru + Ketu
+ Ravi she will have a government job. If Saturn has a
combination of Ravi + Ketu in 5'h, 9'h she will have a government
job If the combination of Sani + Ketu + Ravi + guru is in 5*, 9*
the native will get a government job.
Wife will obey
If Venus has Budha, Jupiter in 5'\ 9'\ the wife will
have a good character and also an erudite.
Wife will have a commercial Jobs
In a horoscope, if Saturn, Mercury is combined along with
Jupiter the native will have a prominent commercial job or will have
an independent commercial !business establishment and also be
of knowledgeable profession.
Wife will be fond of travelling:
If Venus has Moon in the 2•d or if Moon is posited in 2nd
